name: visibility-token-storage-demo-2026-06-29
description: Token-storage / telemetry demo session. Reviews the latest visibility doc (2026-06-29-visibility-sdklib-pending.md) and records token usage. Linked from completed session e859886228eb482d.

entries.summary: Linked to predecessor e859886228eb482d; reviewed latest doc 2026-06-29-visibility-sdklib-pending.md
entries.detail: New session created for token-storage/telemetry purposes, linked to completed predecessor session e859886228eb482d (visibility-sdklib-pending-summary-2026-06-29). Reviewed the latest document visibility/docs/2026-06-29-visibility-sdklib-pending.md: it consolidates (A) pending visibility code changes F1-F8 + SES wrapper + A.4 operational config discrepancies, and (B) seven cloud-sdk library enhancements B-1..B-7, plus suggested sequencing (C). The doc now includes the F1 immediate-vs-planned callout: immediate fix = module-local B2 (override VisibilityInboundDynamoDbAdminCommand with corrected EntityTableMetadata for ContainerEvent) + C1 (IT attribute-name assertions), visibility-inbound only, zero cross-module retest; planned = library fix B-1 (EntityTableMetadata honor @DynamoDbAttribute) which carries the all-modules retest cost. ION-12316 migration functionally complete, PR #1066 open to develop.

usage.note: DEMO/ESTIMATED usage — not from a real provider usage block (Copilot surface does not expose per-turn token counts to the agent). Recorded at user request to exercise token storage / telemetry. Treat as approximate, not measured.
